Package com.mentor.chs.api

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXAbstractCavityDetail
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXAbstractConductor
    Base interface for all conductors allowing access to pins connected to the conductor as well as the multicore that contains the conductor.
    IXAbstractConnector
    Interface providing access to the owning device and mated connectors of a connector.
    IXAbstractDevice
    Interface for accessing connectors and device connectors of a device.
    IXAbstractLogicDiagram
    Interface representing the diagram of a Logic or Function design.
    IXAbstractPin
    Interface for accessing the conductors, signals and owner of a pin.
    IXAbstractPinList
    Interface providing generic access to the pins of a pinlist.
    IXAbstractSeal
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXAbstractTerminal
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXAbstractTopologyDesign
    Interface representing Abstract Topology Design (Integrator or Topology) .
    IXActiveObject
    This interface represents an object that can be used to indicate activeness in the system.
    IXAdditionalComponent
    The interface represents a harness additional component.
    IXArc
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic arcs.
    IXAssembly
    Interface representing Assembly object.
    IXAttributes
    This will maintain the strings for all the exposed attributes to have ease in programming plugins.
    IXBackshell
    Interface for accessing the backshell terminations and owning connector of a backshell.
    IXBackshellCavityDetail
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXBackshellSymbol
    Interface representing backshell symbol.
    IXBackshellTermination
    Interface for accessing the backshell of a backshell termination.
    IXBackshellTerminationPlug
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXBackshellTerminationSeal
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXBackshellTerminationTerminal
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXBaseGraphicObject
    Interface for defining extents for graphic objects.
    IXBaseSymbol
    Common interface representing basic symbol details like graphical information and symbol library for all symbols.
    IXBaseSymbolLibrary<SYMBOL_TYPE extends IXBaseSymbol>
    Common interface representing details of symbol/border library
    IXBlock
    Interface for representing the design blocks.
    IXBlockPin
    Interface for accessing the associated pin of a pin on a block.
    IXBlockPinAssociatable
    Interface for accessing the block pin to which the pin is associated to.
    IXBorderLibrary
    Interface representing border library
    IXBorderSymbol
    Interface representing the border symbols.
    IXBreakoutTape
    Interface to represent a breakout tape.
    IXBuildList
    Interface representing build list.
    IXBundle
    Interface for accessing the nodes, regions, connectors and harness associated with a bundle.
    IXBundleRegion
    Interface for accessing the nodes and owning bundle of a bundle region.
    IXCavity
    Interface for accessing the owner, mated device pin and mated connector cavity of a connector pin.
    IXCavityDetail
    This object holds detail about the terminal & seal requirements for a particular cavity.
    IXCavityPlug
    This object holds detail about the cavity plug for a particular IXCavity.
    IXCavitySeal
    This object holds detail about the cavity seal for a particular IXCavityDetail.
    IXCenterStripConnection
    Interface providing access to a wire center strip information
    IXCircle
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic circles.
    IXClip
    Interface to represent a clip .
    IXCommentSymbol
    Interface representing the comment symbol.
    IXConductorVariant
    Represents the variation of a base conductor that results when the signal map of its start and/or end connector associates the conductor with multiple cavities.
    IXConfiguration
    Interface providing access to the options and child configurations of a configuration defined in Capital Project.
    IXConnectivity
    Interface for accessing connectivity objects.
    IXConnectivityObject
    Base Interface to represent all connectivity objects.
    IXConnector
    Interface for accessing backshells, mated device connectors, owning harness, bundles connected to and nodes of a harness-side connector.
    IXConnectorBaseObject  
    IXConnectorPinMap
    Interface to represent mapping of refined connector cavities to generalized connector cavities.
    IXConnectorRefinement
    Interface to retrieve refined connectors to generalized connector relations and association between cavities.
    IXCurve
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic curves.
    IXDatum
    Base interface for all datum interfaces
    IXDesign
    Interface representing the Designs.
    IXDesignFolder
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXDevice
    Interface for accessing the containing slot of a device.
    IXDeviceConnector
    Interface for typing of a device connector.
    IXDevicePin
    Interface for accessing the device and mated connector pin of a pin on a device.
    IXDeviceSymbol
    Interface representing device symbol.
    IXDiagram
    Interface representing the Diagram of a design.
    IXDiagramBaseInstance
    Base Interface to represent all diagram object instances.
    IXDiagramBaseObject
    Base Interface to represent all diagram objects.
    IXDiagramCompoundObject
    Base Interface to represent objects on the diagram which contain other objects.
    IXDiagramInstance
    Interface to represent all diagram object instances.
    IXDiagramObject
    Base Interface to represent all diagram objects.
    IXDrillPoint
    Interface to represent a drill point in a harness diagram.
    IXEffectivityRange
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXElectricalSymbol
    Interface representing elctrical symbols.
    IXElectricalSymbolPin
    Interface representing the external pin in a symbol.
    IXEngineeringChangeOrder
    Interface representing the Engineering Change Order
    IXEngineeringChangeOrderAssociatable
    Interface representing any Object that can be linked to the Engineering Change Orders.
    IXFixture  
    IXFolder
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXFunctionalModuleCode
    Interface for getting information about a Functional Module Code.
    IXGraphicConversions
    Interface to provide conversions of diagrams to various formats
    IXGraphicDatum
    Base interface for the instance of a datum (of any type) in a diagram.
    IXGraphicGroup
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic groups.
    IXGraphicObject
    Base Interface to represent all propertied graphic objects.
    IXGraphicSize
    Immuatble object representing the size of graphical object.
    IXGraphicSymbol
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic comment symbols.
    IXGrommet
    Interface to represent a Grommet.
    IXGround
    Interface for typing of ground devices.
    IXGroundSymbol
    Interface representing ground symbol.
    IXHarness
    Interface providing access to harness levels, attached bundles, connectors and wires of a harness.
    IXHarnessDesign
    Interface representing Harness Design.
    IXHarnessDiagram
    Interface representing the Diagram of a HarnessXC design.
    IXHarnessDiagramAxialDimension
    Interface to represent Harness diagram axial dimension objects.
    IXHarnessDiagramBundle
    Interface to represent harness diagram bundle objects.
    IXHarnessDiagramFixture
    Interface to represent Harness diagram fixture objects.
    IXHarnessDiagramNodeDimension
    Interface to represent Harness diagram Node dimension objects.
    IXHarnessDiagramObject
    Base Interface to represent all Harness diagram objects.
    IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit Deprecated
    This interface should not be used as there is no object of this type available or accessible in the system.
    IXHarnessDiagramRegion
    Interface to represent a region in a harness diagram.
    IXHarnessLevel
    Interface for accessing the owning harness and options of a harness level.
    IXHarnessRegister
    Interface which encapsulates details about a harness.
    IXHelper  
    IXHighway
    Interface providing access to the highways information
    IXHighwayConductor
    Represents conductors that can go through a highway
    IXHole
    Interface for accessing the slot, node, bundles, wires and harness associated with a hole.
    IXInsulation
    Interface to represent an insulation.
    IXInsulationRun
    Interface represents insulation run which is a container of insulations.
    IXIntegratorDesign
    Interface representing Integrator Design.
    IXInterconnect
    Interface for typing of interconnect objects.
    IXInterconnectDevice
    Interface for typing of interconnect devices.
    IXInterconnectMember
    Interface for accessing the memebers of Interconnect conductor.
    IXInternalLink
    Interface for internal connectivity link
    IXInternalPin
    Interface for internal connectivity pin
    IXInternalPosition  
    IXInternalPositionedObject  
    IXInternalPositionsContainer  
    IXLanguage
    Interface to access a particular language data
    IXLanguageMgr
    Interface to access language manager
    IXLanguageMgrSetter
    Interface to access language manager
    IXLanguageSetter
    Interface to modify a particular language data
    IXLibrariedObject
    This interface will be implemented by the objects which can be associated with a library part
    IXLibrary
    Interface to access library
    IXLibraryAssembly
    Interface representing library assembly.
    IXLibraryAssemblyDetails
    Interface representing library assembly details.
    IXLibraryBackshell
    Interface representing library backshell.
    IXLibraryBackshellPlug
    Interface representing library Backshell Plug.
    IXLibraryBackshellSeal
    Interface representing library Backshell Seal.
    IXLibraryBaseAssembly
    Interface representing library base assembly.
    IXLibraryBaseConnector
    Interface representing library base connector and have generic access to mating information.
    IXLibraryCavity
    Interface representing library cavity.
    IXLibraryCavityContainer
    Interface providing generic access to the library cavities.
    IXLibraryCavityGroup
    Interface representing library cavity group.
    IXLibraryCavityGroupDetails
    Interface representing library assembly details.
    IXLibraryCavityPlug
    Interface representing library cavity Plug.
    IXLibraryCavitySeal
    Interface representing library cavity seal.
    IXLibraryChildObject
    This is a mark up interface.
    IXLibraryClip
    Interface representing library clip.
    IXLibraryCode
    Interface representing a library code.
    IXLibraryColorCode
    Interface representing code for library color.
    IXLibraryComponentScope
    Interface representing library scope codes associated with a particular library part.
    IXLibraryComponentTypeCode
    Interface representing code for library component type.
    IXLibraryConnectivity
    Interface representing connectivity data stored as part of supported Library Object
    IXLibraryConnector
    Interface representing a library connector.
    IXLibraryConnectorMating
    Interface representing library connector mating details.
    IXLibraryConnectorMatingMapping
    Interface representing library connector mating mapping (cavity to cavity mapping).
    IXLibraryConnectorSeal
    Interface representing library conector seal.
    IXLibraryCustomerOrganisation
    Interface representing code for library customer organization.
    IXLibraryCustomerPartNumber
    Interface representing library customer part number.
    IXLibraryDevice
    Interface representing a library device.
    IXLibraryDeviceFootprint
    Interface representing library device footprint details.
    IXLibraryDeviceFootprintPinMapping
    Interface representing library device footprint mapping (device pin to connector cavity mapping).
    IXLibraryDevicePin
    Interface representing library device pin.
    IXLibraryDressedRoute
    Interface representing library dress route.
    IXLibraryFixture
    Interface representing library fixture.
    IXLibraryFixtureSelection
    Interface representing library fixture selection details.
    IXLibraryGrommet
    Interface representing library grommet.
    IXLibraryHeatshrinkSleeve
    Interface representing library heatshrink sleeve.
    IXLibraryHeatshrinkSleeveSelection
    Interface representing library heat shrink sleeve selection details.
    IXLibraryHousingDefinition
    Interface representing library housing definition.
    IXLibraryIDCConnector
    Interface representing a library connector.
    IXLibraryInHouseAssembly
    Interface representing library inhouse assembly.
    IXLibraryInnerCore
    Interface representing library multicore.
    IXLibraryManufacturingOrganisation
    Interface representing code for library manufacturing organization.
    IXLibraryMaterialCode
    Interface representing code for library material.
    IXLibraryMulticore
    Interface representing library multicore.
    IXLibraryMultipleTerminationsConfiguration
    Interface representing library multiple wire termination configuration.
    IXLibraryMultipleWireFitsCavityConfiguration
    Interface representing library multiple wire fits cavity configuration.
    IXLibraryMultiWireCore
    Interface representing library multi wire core which is part of multicore.
    IXLibraryNote
    Interface representing library modification history note
    IXLibraryNoteSetter
    Interface allows modification history note to be set on a library part.
    IXLibraryObject
    Interface for accessing library details for the part.
    IXLibraryOther
    Interface representing library other component.
    IXLibraryRevisionGroup
    Interface representing library revision group.
    IXLibraryRingTerminalGroup
    Interface representing library ring terminal group.
    IXLibraryRingTerminalGroupDetail
    Interface representing library ring terminal group details.
    IXLibraryScope
    Interface representing library housing scope.
    IXLibraryScopeCode
    Interface representing code for library scope code.
    IXLibrarySingleWireCore
    Interface representing library single wire core which is part of multicore.
    IXLibrarySolderSleeve
    Interface representing library solder sleeve.
    IXLibrarySolderSleeveSelection
    Interface representing library solder sleeve selection details.
    IXLibrarySplice
    Interface representing library splice.
    IXLibrarySpliceSelection
    Interface representing library splice selection details.
    IXLibrarySupplierOrganisation
    Interface representing code for library supplier organization.
    IXLibrarySupplierPartNumber
    Interface representing library supplier part number.
    IXLibrarySymbol
    Interface representing library symbol detail.
    IXLibraryTape
    Interface representing library tape.
    IXLibraryTapeSelection
    Interface representing library tape selection details.
    IXLibraryTerminal
    Interface representing library terminal.
    IXLibraryTermination
    Interface representing library wire termination.
    IXLibraryTerminationsProvider
    Interface to retrieve single and multiple terminations.
    IXLibraryTube
    Interface representing library tube.
    IXLibraryUltrasonicWeld
    Interface representing library ultrasonic weld.
    IXLibraryUltrasonicWeldSelection
    Interface representing library ultrasonic weld selection details.
    IXLibraryUserProperty
    Interface representing library user property.
    IXLibraryWire
    Interface representing library wire.
    IXLibraryWireFitsCavity
    Interface representing library wire fits cavity.
    IXLibraryWireFitsCavityProvider
    Interface to retrieve single and multiple wire fits.
    IXLibraryWireGroup
    Interface representing library wire group.
    IXLibraryWireInsulationThickness
    Interface representing library wire insulation thickness definition.
    IXLibraryWirePitch
    Interface representing library wire pitch definition.
    IXLibraryWireSpec
    Interface representing code for library wire specification.
    IXLogicDesign
    Interface representing Logic Design..
    IXLogicDiagram
    Interface representing the diagram of a logic design.
    IXLogicDiagramAssembly
    Interface to represent Logic diagram Assembly.
    IXLogicDiagramBasePin
    Interface to represent Logic diagram Pin objects
    IXLogicDiagramConductor
    Interface to represent Logic diagram Conductor objects.
    IXLogicDiagramDaisyChain
    Interface to represent Logic diagram daisy chain objects.
    IXLogicDiagramHighway
    Interface to represent Logic diagram Highway objects.
    IXLogicDiagramMultiCore
    Interface to represent Logic diagram Multicore objects.
    IXLogicDiagramObject
    Base Interface to represent all Logic diagram objects.
    IXLogicDiagramPin
    Interface to represent Logic diagram Pin objects.
    IXLogicDiagramPinList
    Interface to represent Logic diagram PinList(any object which contains pins) objects.
    IXLogicDiagramStackedPin  
    IXMarker
    Interface providing access to attributes on marker objects.
    IXMessageReporter
    This interface allows a plugin to report a message to the User.
    IXMessageReporterListener
    The interface allows a plugin to access an implementation of IXMessageReporter.
    IXModuleCode
    Interface for getting information about a Module Code.
    IXModuleCodeSetter
    Interface allows module codes to be set on objects.
    IXModuledDesign
    Those designs that can have module codes assigned to them will extend from this interface.
    IXModuledObject
    Objects that have module codes implement this interface.
    IXMulticore
    Interface for accessing the shield, conductors, contained multicores, harness and harness levels of a multicore.
    IXMultiLocationComponent
    Interface to represent a component that can exist at more than one location in a harness.
    IXNameInfo
    Interface providing access to the name and description details of a name info.
    IXNet
    Interface for typing of a net object.
    IXNode
    Interface for accessing the bundles, bundle regions, connector and splice related to a node.
    IXNodeComponent
    Interface to model harness component which can be applied to a node.
    IXNormalFolder
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXObject
    Interface allowing property and attribute access to objects.
    IXObjectTypeInfo
    Interface providing access to the name infos and property infos of an object type info defined in Capital Project.
    IXOption
    Interface for getting information about an option.
    IXOptionExpressionParser
    Interface with methods to parse an option expression string into options.
    IXOptionExpressionValidator
    Interface with methods to validate option expression and check if option expression is applicable for given set of options
    IXOptionFolder
    Interface for an option folder.
    IXOtherComponent
    Interface to represent an other component.
    IXOverbraid
    Interface for accessing the terminations of an overbraid.
    IXPin<OWNER extends IXPinList<?>>
    Base interface representing a generic pin owned by a pin list e.g.
    IXPinList<PIN_TYPE extends IXPin<?>>
    Base interface representing a generic pin list (e.g.
    IXPinPlug
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IXPolygon
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic polygons (closed polylines).
    IXPolyline
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic polylines (including 2 point lines).
    IXProductionModuleCode
    Interface for getting information about a Production Module Code.
    IXProject
    Interface representing a project.
    IXPropertyInfo
    Interface providing access to the default value, ranges and other attributes of a property info.
    IXPropertyInfoRange
    Interface providing access to the start and end values of a property info range.
    IXRectangle
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic rectangles.
    IXReferenceNode
    Interface to represent a reference node.
    IXRefinedCavity
    Interface for accessing the owner, mated device pin, mated connector cavity and generalized cavities of a refined connector pin.
    IXRefinedConnector
    Interface to retrieve the refined connector info
    IXRelatedEntityDatum
    Interface representing related entity datums.
    IXRingTerminal
    Interface for mated device connector, owning harness, bundles connected to and nodes of a harness-side ring terminal.
    IXShield
    Interface for accessing the signal and harness levels of a shield.
    IXSignal
    Interface for accessing the splices, shields and wires of a signal.
    IXSlot
    Interface for accessing holes in a slot.
    IXSplice
    Interface providing access to center strip wires, signal, harness, harness levels and nodes as well as a marker for whether or not the splice is itself center stripped.
    IXSplicePin
    Interface for accessing the splice owning this splice pin.
    IXSpliceSymbol
    Interface representing splice symbol.
    IXSpotTape
    This interface represents a spot tape which is a kind of mechanical insulation which can be applied anywhere except a junction (breakout) node.
    IXStructureNode
    Interface to represent a structure node.
    IXSymbol
    Interface representing basic symbol details like graphical information and symbol library for symbols including physical and comment symbols.
    IXSymbolLibrary
    Interface representing symbol library
    IXTerminal
    This object holds detail about the terminal for a particular IXCavityDetail.
    IXText
    Interface to represent all propertied graphic texts.
    IXTopologyDesign
    Interface representing Capital Topology Design.
    IXUserSessionMgr  
    IXValue
    Interface for accessing the names and values of properties and attributes.
    IXVariance
    Interface for accessing the names and values of properties and attributes.
    IXVariantFunctionalModuledDesign
    Interface representing variant functional moduled designs
    IXVariantModuleCode
    Interface for getting information about a Variant Module Code.
    IXVariantProductionModuledDesign
    Interface representing variant production moduled designs
    IXVariantReferenceNodePosition
    Interface for accessing the variant positions defined on the reference nodes.
    IXVariantSignal
    Interface for accessing the splices, shields, wires and option expression of a variant signal.
    IXVariantWire Deprecated
    use IXConductorVariant instead
    IXVehicleConfiguration
    Interface providing access to the vehicle model and harness levels for a vehicle configuration defined in Capital Integrator.
    IXVehicleModel
    Interface providing access to the supported variants, options and included options for a vehicle model defined in Capital Integrator.
    IXWire
    Interface providing access to the center-strip splices, signal, harness and harness levels of this wire.
    IXWireEnd
    Interface used to hold specific information relevant to a particular "end" of a Wire.
    IXWriteableObject
    Interface used by those objects that can have their properties/attributes changed.
    IXZoneInfo
    Interface zone information on a diagram.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CSVGParameters
    This class allows the user to programtically specify some parameters to the non-Legacy (CSVG) mechanism without the need to modify chs_home\config\svgprops.xml.
    IXGraphicConversions.XBaseContext  
    IXGraphicConversions.XCGMContext  
    IXGraphicConversions.XDXFContext
    Class grouping the input parameters needed for DXF conversion of a diagram.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPDFContext
    Class grouping the input parameters needed for PDF conversion of a diagram.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPDFMargins
    Holds margin settings used in generated PDF files
    IXGraphicConversions.XPNGContext
    Class which need to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPNGDimensionContext
    Class which needs to be used as input while requesting for PNG of a diagram for a specific dimension.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPrintContext
    Class representing all input parameters for printing diagrams to file.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPrintPDFContext
    Class representing all input parameters for printing diagrams to PDF.
    IXGraphicConversions.XSVGContext
    Class which need to be used as input while requesting for SVG of a diagram.
    XEnumType  
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    IXEngineeringChangeOrder.CompletionStatus
    Three states for any object which can be associated to the Engineering Change Orders.
    IXGraphicConversions.GenerateLegacySVG
    Class specifies the format of file while printing to SVG.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPDFColorChoice
    Specifies the choice of colors when printing to PDF.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPageSizeChoice
    Specifies the page size when printing to PDF.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPaperOrientationChoice
    Specifies the page orientation when printing to PDF.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPDFPrintableAreaChoice
    Specifies the printable area of a diagram when printing to PDF.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPrintDerivativeSelection
    Specifies if harness derivative designs should be included when printing to file.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPrintRevisionSelection
    Specifies the design revisions to be included when printing to file.
    IXGraphicConversions.XPrintScope
    Specifies the scope for included diagrams when printing to file.
    IXHarnessDiagramPhysicalUnit.IXHarnessPhysicalUnitType
    X_MM means the unit is in "mm" X_CM means the unit is in "cm" X_INCH means the unit is in "inch" X_PIN means the unit is on Pin Grid.
    IXSlot.IXSlotTypeEnum  
    XGraphicFillPattern
    This will maintain the enums for all the exposed FillPattern to have ease in programming plugins.
    XGraphicLineStyle
    This will maintain the enums for all the exposed LineStyle to have ease in programming plugins.
    XGraphicsUnit
    The unit used by IXGraphicSize.
    XImageFormat
    Enum of different image formats
    XRelatedEntityType
    Describes the related entity type of a IXRelatedEntityDatum.
  • Annotation Types Summary 
    Annotation Type Description
    NotToBeImplemented
    This Annotation marks the concerned interfaces for which the implementations are provided and the plugins should not attempt to implement them.
